questions.statement:
<p><strong>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>Annul</p>

<p><strong>Choose the option that fits the given description.</strong></p>

<p>One who does not express himself freely</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>PROMINENT</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate antonym of the given word</strong></p>

<p>Philanthropist</p>

<p><strong><u>Direction</u>: Given below is a sentence with the underlined word followed by four words. Select the option that is opposite in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response accordingly.</strong></p>

<p>Trying to be loved is not the best way of becoming <strong><u>lovable</u>.</strong></p>

<p><strong>Which of the following word is opposite in meaning to the underlined word?</strong></p>

<p>Three years later, she was deep in debt and while <u>struggling</u> to get out of it, she started working as a spa therapist.</p>

<p><strong>Choose the correct option that expresses the meaning of the underlined idiom :</strong></p>

<p>Smugglers tried <u>to fish in the troubled waters</u> during World War Il.</p>
options: to take advantage from a chaotic situation /

questions.statement:
<p><span style="font-weight: 700; ">In the following question, choose the word which can be substituted for the given expression.&nbsp;</span></p>

<p>A person who always runs after women</p>

<p><strong>Directions: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words.</strong></p>

<p>Withdraw from a forward position in battle</p>

<p style=""><span style="font-weight: 700;">Direction:&nbsp;</span>Choose the word which is most nearly the&nbsp;<span style="font-weight: 700;">antonym</span><span style="font-weight: 700;">&nbsp;</span>in the meaning as the word printed in&nbsp;<span style="font-weight: 700;">Bold</span>.</p>
<strong>Knell</strong>
